summary: Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison stands in the White House Blue Room and says to camera: 'the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.' The clip ends on an animated 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark over a line-art White House.

script.scene: Rick Harrison stands with arms spread in the White House Blue Room, addressing the camera.
Harrison in the Blue Room saying the line 'the best I can do is the golden age for small businesses.'
Cut to black; animated letters move onto the screen.
Letters resolve into a 'THE WHITE HOUSE' wordmark over a line-art White House.
Final 'THE WHITE HOUSE' title card with the flag detail.

notable_text: BEST I CAN DO IS THE GOLDEN AGE FOR SMALL BUSINESSES; Pawn Stars' Rick Harrison x White House; THE WHITE HOUSE
